title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss how the shift to remote work affects these areas of life, then decide which two are the most challenging for companies to manage.

script.text: Please discuss how working from home affects these different aspects of professional life.
Now decide which two aspects are the hardest for employers to get right.
